context: 2015 was a strong year for Bollywood music led by Salman Khan's Prem Ratan Dhan Payo, whose title track topped nationwide charts. Arijit Singh consolidated his position as the decade's defining male voice. The year balanced big masala anthems with soulful ballads from Tamasha and Dum Laga Ke Haisha, demonstrating Bollywood's wide tonal range.

tracks.title: Sooraj Dooba Hai Yaaron
tracks.artist: Arijit Singh & Aditi Singh Sharma (from Roy)

tracks.title: Moh Moh Ke Dhaage
tracks.artist: Monali Thakur & Papon (from Dum Laga Ke Haisha)

tracks.title: Gallan Goodiyaan
tracks.artist: Sukhwinder Singh & Farhan Akhtar (from Dil Dhadakne Do)
